tagline: Turn chaotic work into actionable revenue.

designSystem.style: Dark-first financial dashboard with vibrant teal-green accent, deep navy surfaces, glassmorphic cards, and a coaching-forward tone that blends data density with readable hierarchy

screens: Dashboard — Live P&L snapshot with period toggle (today/week/month), margin bars per client, weekly profit chart, and one-tap EOD recap CTA
Activity Log — Quick-log panel with type selector (Call/Task/Meeting/Expense), chronological activity feed with impact values, and inline AI coaching insight
Insights — Business health score with donut gauge, severity-filtered insight cards (danger/warn/gain), and smart pricing suggestion table
What-If Simulator — Scenario picker with projected delta, custom rate-raise slider, and apply CTA with projected margin preview
Settings — Profile card, dark/light theme toggle, notification toggles (prompts, EOD recap, AI nudges), business config, and data export options
